jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Partner with product and operations teams to build source-of-truth dashboards, curate datasets, and deliver stakeholder reporting with SQL and data visualization.

jobs.title: Junior Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Support business reporting with Excel and Power BI, clean data, maintain dashboards, and communicate findings to stakeholders.

jobs.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Build measurement frameworks, self-serve analytics assets, and Tableau reporting for customer analytics teams across the business.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Create dashboards, report on critical metrics, and use Python plus SQL to support data governance and analytics workflows.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Analyze complex datasets, build interactive visualizations, create reports, and support strategic decision-making for cross-functional teams.
